title: Jamesonia warscewiczii
taxonomy: Jamesonia warscewiczii is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This species is a member of the genus Jamesonia, which is a group of vascular plants commonly known as the "queens of the air plants" due to their unique habit of growing in a hanging or pendant manner. The classification of Jamesonia warscewiczii places it within the division Pteridophyta, which consists of all ferns and their closest relatives. Further classification includes its placement within the kingdom Plantae.
